creator: trialero@gmx.com
text:
I don't know if technically it is a duplicate. The error message after starting luakit from terminal in a GUI is different. Besides others reported that after fixing bug 266975 problems were gone. Not on my box though, and I suspect interference from other packages but couldn't find out.

I _presume_ that the newer version of glib causes this, because it is the only change on the software on my box.
